name: Enchilada Stack
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Beef or Chicken Filling (Que Bueno Enchilada Sauce recipes)
1/2 cup Que Bueno Refried Beans, prepared according to label
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, soften the corn tortillas in hot vegetable oil. Drain on paper towels.
2. Place enchilada sauce in a flat container. Dip one tortilla in the enchilada sauce to coat. Place the coated tortilla in an oven-proof baking dish.
3. Place one scoop (about 1/30 cup) of beef or chicken filling on the dipped tortilla. Spread the filling to the edges using a spatula. Sprinkle half an ounce of cheese over the filling.
4. Repeat layers using the other five softened tortillas. Alternately layer one scoop (about 1/30 cup) of refried beans and half an ounce of cheese instead of beef or chicken filling.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or heat in a microwave oven for 3-3
